nasb.text: Now Absalom had fled. And the young man who was the watchman raised his eyes and looked, and behold, many people were coming from the road behind him by the side of the mountain.

esv.text: But Absalom fled. And the young man who kept the watch lifted up his eyes and looked, and behold, many people were coming from the road behind him by the side of the mountain.

cnv.text: 押沙龍逃走了。守望的年輕人舉目觀看，看見許多人從後面山坡旁邊的路而來。

ccb.text: 此时，押沙龙已经逃走了。守卫的人举目瞭望，见有一大群人从山坡上跑来。
